message:
feat(indexer): persist lexical generation manifest on rebuild (bd ibuuh.30)

rebuild_tantivy_from_db_with_options now writes a
LexicalGenerationManifest alongside the equivalence ledger at the end
of a successful rebuild:

- generation_id = "gen-{now_ms:016x}-{first_16_of_source_fingerprint}"
- attempt_id    = "attempt-{now_ms:016x}"
- counters      : conversation_count, message_count, indexed_doc_count
- links         : equivalence_manifest_fingerprint ties back to the
                  ledger written earlier in this rebuild
- lifecycle     : immediately transitioned through Built → Validated →
                  Published because this slice builds in place (a
                  future slice will stage in a scratch directory and
                  atomically promote on publish)

If store_manifest() fails we tracing::warn but don't fail the rebuild
— the rebuild succeeded and the manifest is observability/auditing
metadata, not correctness-critical this slice. A follow-up will promote
write failure to a hard error once the scratch-directory slice lands.
